things.name: Boiling Lake (Morne Trois Pitons)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage second largest boiling lake in the world - a challenging 6-hour rainforest hike

things.name: Trafalgar Falls
things.description: Twin waterfalls in a volcanic valley - one hot, one cold - accessible to all fitness levels

things.name: Titou Gorge
things.description: Swim through a narrow volcanic gorge to a hidden waterfall - filmed in Pirates of the Caribbean

things.name: Morne Trois Pitons National Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage tropical rainforest with volcano fumaroles, sulphur springs and crater lakes

things.name: Kalinago Barana Aute Cultural Village
things.description: Living village of the Kalinago - the last surviving indigenous people of the Caribbean

things.name: Whale Watching & Sperm Whales
things.description: Dominica has resident sperm whales year-round - a unique Caribbean experience

things.name: Roseau Saturday Market
things.description: Fresh produce market with rare tropical fruits unique to Dominica

things.name: Indian River Boat Trip
things.description: Row along the mysterious mangrove river used in Pirates of the Caribbean filming

things.name: Champagne Reef Snorkelling
things.description: Volcanic bubbles rising from the sea floor create an underwater champagne effect

things.name: Crab Back (Stuffed Land Crab)
things.description: Dominica's signature dish - mountain crab meat stuffed back in its shell with seasoned rice
